intake.background: Audit found 7 dual-channel reason/fix sites in tool/signals_sync.hexa where the sentinel line carrying reason=<slug> was followed by a separate eprintln carrying reason=<slug> fix=<directive>. This breaks single-line consumers (log scrapers, tail-grep reason=...fix=).
intake.line_drift_explanation: Audit reported pre-existing line numbers; the file shifted slightly (995 -> 1002, 1000 -> 1013, 1007 -> 1020, 1138 -> 1153) but all 7 dual-channel pairs were located unambiguously by content match.
non_dual_channel_already_single_line: lines 960+961 (--batch missing-arg): line 960 is a human-readable error string without reason=; line 961 is already a single-line reason=...fix= trailer. Not a dual-channel pair, left unchanged.
lines 969+970 (unknown-arg): line 969 is a human-readable error string without reason=; line 970 is already a single-line reason=...fix= trailer. Not a dual-channel pair, left unchanged.

falsifiers_pre_registered.evidence: All 7 dual-channel pairs located: 939+940, 949+950, 980+981, 1002+1003, 1013+1014, 1020+1021, 1153+1154. Audit's stale lines reconciled via content match.

All 7 pairs collapsed by appending ' fix=<directive>' from the second eprintln onto the first eprintln's sentinel string. Both reason=<slug> and fix=<directive> content preserved verbatim — only line-structure changed. No semantic change.

hexa run tool/signals_sync.hexa --selftest -> __SIGNALS_SYNC_SELFTEST__ PASS (ids_a=3, ids_b=3, only_a=SIG-Z-001, only_b=SIG-W-001, common=SIG-X-001,SIG-Y-001, content_drift=SIG-Y-001). Identical to pre-edit baseline.

Sentinel-only reason=<slug> lines (no fix=): before=7, after=0 (delta=-7). Total file line count: before=1207, after=1202 (delta=-5; -7 collapsed pairs offset by +2 added @trailer-format docstring lines). Single-line eprintln(.*reason=.*fix=) trailers: before=2 already-conformant + 7 dual-channel-pairs (across 14 lines), after=9 single-line conformant (across 9 lines).

@sentinel docstrings (lines 8-9) updated to show fix=<directive> alongside reason=<slug>. Added @trailer-format(raw-66-v2-R1 single-line) declaration. Help-output sentinel lines (802-803) also updated to match for end-user consistency.

axes_fan_out.evidence: 0 sentinel-only reason= lines remain; all 9 reason=...fix= trailers now appear on a single eprintln; correlation with content-preservation axis is < 0.7 (orthogonal: structural restructure does not require semantic change).

Per-site verbatim diff confirms slug strings (patch-out-missing-arg, direction-missing-arg, apply-trivial-without-env-gate, cross-publish-without-direction, cross-publish-without-env-gate, cross-publish-without-direction-confirm, cross-publish-repo-not-discovered) and fix= directive strings are byte-identical. String concatenation of `+ direction +` and `+ _core_root()` preserved as-is in 4 of 7 sites that used dynamic interpolation.

per_site_action.interpolation: dynamic (direction var, twice — once in reason, once in fix)

smoke_tests.stderr_first_line: __SIGNALS_SYNC_APPLY__ FAIL applied=0 patches=0 skipped=0 reason=apply-trivial-without-env-gate fix=NEXUS_SIGNALS_SYNC_APPLY=1 hexa run tool/signals_sync.hexa --apply-trivial [--emit-patch]
__SIGNALS_SYNC_PUBLISH__ FAIL published=0 patches=0 skipped=0 direction= reason=cross-publish-without-direction fix=--direction nexus-to-n6arch | n6arch-to-nexus

smoke_tests.note: two lines (already-conformant single-line trailer; first line is human-readable error not carrying reason=, so not a dual-channel pair per audit definition; left unchanged)

deltas.single_line_reason_fix_trailers: 0 (count unchanged because the 7 already-existed-but-detached fix-lines were absorbed INTO their sentinel partners; net result: 9 conformant single-line trailers, 0 detached fix-lines, 0 dual-channel pairs)

diff_summary: tool/signals_sync.hexa: 9 edits — 7 collapse-pair edits (each replaces 2 eprintln lines with 1) + 2 docstring edits (@sentinel lines 8-9 add 'fix=<directive>' suffix and prepend a new @trailer-format line; help-output sentinel lines 802-803 add 'fix=<directive>' suffix). All 7 reason= slugs and 7 fix= directives preserved byte-verbatim. selftest still PASS.
carry_forward: Trailer-format uniformity now enforced at 7 prior-deviation sites in signals_sync.hexa.
Other tools may exhibit the same dual-channel pattern; consider auditing tool/*.hexa with grep -nE 'eprintln\(.*reason=[a-z0-9-]+"\)$' across the repo as a follow-up audit topic.
raw 66 v2 R1 single-line conformance documented inline via new @trailer-format(raw-66-v2-R1 single-line) docstring header — provides forward guidance for future trailer authoring in this file.
No exceptions raised: every dual-channel pair was a pure structural artifact (no fix= depended on inter-line computed values), so collapse was lossless at all 7 sites.
raw_66_trailer: reason=trailer-uniformity-fix-r1-complete fix=all 7 dual-channel reason/fix pairs in tool/signals_sync.hexa collapsed to single-line conformant with raw 66 v2 R1; selftest PASS; docstring updated
